visual_summary: A text component that displays text on a button-style design with hover effect. Typically used as a simple interactive text element. Hover over it to see animation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Hyper Text Demo
Description: A text component that displays text on a button-style design with hover effect. Typically used as a simple interactive text element. Hover over it to see animation.
Style: button, animated
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: text-component, interactive, button, hover-effect

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { HyperText } from "@/registry/magicui/hyper-text"

export default function HyperTextDemo() {
  return <HyperText>Hover Me!</HyperText>
}
